title: Coca-Cola Europacific Partners Embraces AI and Automation to Transform Supply Chain
description: CCEP is investing heavily in AI-driven Customer Demand & Supply Planning (CDSP) systems and digital twin technology to optimize warehouse capacity. The integration of automated guided vehicles and machine learning helps forecast sales demand and improve sustainable packaging efforts.

title: Coca-Cola İçecek Builds Digital Twin to Automate Supply Chain Network Design
description: By partnering with Phoenix Analytics, Coca-Cola İçecek successfully created a digital twin of its supply chain across 12 countries. This SQL-based automation reduced scenario creation time from days to minutes, eliminating manual Excel dependency.

title: How Coca-Cola and Maersk Are Optimising Global Supply Chains Using Agentic AI
description: Coca-Cola Europacific Partners is leveraging machine learning for advanced Customer Demand & Supply Planning. This AI orchestration allows the beverage giant to run real-time predictive simulations, ensuring agility against global trade disruptions.

title: Coca-Cola Deploys AI-Powered Procurement and Real-Time Freight Visibility
description: Coca-Cola has integrated AI through Keelvar to automate sourcing decisions and partnered with FourKites for real-time shipment GPS tracking. These digital upgrades have achieved >99% in-stock levels with leaner inventories.

title: Heineken Launches 'CoBrain' GenAI and IoT Smart Brewery Ecosystem
description: Heineken's Connected Brewery program now links 7,000 machines via IoT to optimize water and energy use. The newly introduced 'CoBrain' GenAI assistant allows shop-floor operators to instantly access supply chain knowledge and solve production issues.

title: Heineken Partners with Palantir for AI-Driven Supply Chain Control Tower
description: By leveraging Palantir AIP, Heineken is building a digital twin ontology that connects factories, warehouses, and logistics. The AI control tower provides real-time route optimization, predictive maintenance, and autonomous disruption alerts.

title: Heineken Uses Microsoft Power Platform to Streamline Global Brewery Operations
description: Heineken has developed thousands of low-code applications and automated workflows using Microsoft Power Platform. This digital transformation supports safety on the brewery floor, product quality control, and data accuracy across 192 countries.

title: Beverage Logistics Leader BevChain Saves 1,000 Hours Annually with Blue Yonder
description: BevChain streamlined its transportation network by deploying Blue Yonder's AI-powered supply chain management solutions. The integration eliminated duplicate charge codes and manual routing, boosting predictive analytics and service reliability.
